D:\Programs\Portable\MinGW\w64devkit\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\zarchiveTool.dir/objects.a
D:\Programs\Portable\MinGW\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\zarchiveTool.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\zarchiveTool.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Programs\Portable\MinGW\w64devkit\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\zarchiveTool.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o zarchive.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libzarchive.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\zarchiveTool.dir\linkLibs.rsp
